description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly white with a large, slightly angled display screen at the center. The front features a control panel with a joystick and several colored buttons, designed for interactive gameplay, and a coin slot area below. The top section houses a marquee area with a green and black color scheme, though the artwork is minimal and mostly geometric. The side panels are plain white, lacking any decorative graphics or decals. The rear of the cabinet includes ventilation grilles, access panels, and a few small labels and ports, typical for maintenance and power connections. The overall build is robust, with a hard, smooth exterior likely made from painted wood or laminate over a metal frame.
description: A white upright arcade game cabinet with a large screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and a simple green marquee. The sides are plain, and the rear has access panels and vents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's angled screen, control panel, and plain white side panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen with a fighting game, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, and green marquee.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the plain white side and angled screen.
description_view_3: Rear view showing access panels, ventilation grilles, and maintenance labels.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with a visible bezel, medium-large size, typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and six action buttons, arranged in two rows, with additional start and function buttons; color scheme is mostly green and gray.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Minimalist marquee with a green and black geometric design, no visible text or character artwork.
